channel.title: work on Jennifer Schepke
channel.description: Recent content in work on Jennifer Schepke

item.title: Belle Isle Conservatory
item.description: My favorite garden spot An afternoon at Belle Isle Conservatory in Detroit. Created with: Goauche paint Acrylic paint Pantone postcard

item.title: Cherry Blossoms
item.description: Springtime After a long winter, nature comes back to life. I delight in seeing the cherry blossoms bloom! Created with: Gouache paint Acrylic paint Pantone postcard

item.title: El Limón Forest
item.description: A walk in the rainforest What do the rocky stairs lead to? Created with: Gouache paint Mixed media paper

item.title: Golden Hour at Han River
item.description: Watching the sun go down My favorite time of the day is golden hour. I love how God paints everything with warmth. Created with: Gouache paint Acrylic paint Colored pencils Pantone postcard

item.title: Water Lilies
item.description: Inspired by Monet When I found a Monet book at the bookstore, I wanted to paint some water lilies on canvas. Created with: Acrylic paint Cotton canvas

item.title: After the Storm
item.description: A reminder of God’s promise I saw this rainbow spread across the sky after a long,stormy day. I was reminded of God’s promise in Genesis 9:11-17. Created with: Goauche paint Acrylic paint Pantone postcard

item.title: Fruit of the Spirit
item.description: A Bible verse reminder I created these fruit and put them in a formation to remind myself of Galations 5:22-23. Created with: Adobe sketch (drawing the fruit) Photoshop (hand-written text) Printed on moab entrada paper

item.title: Monarch Butterfly
item.description: A monarch butterfly I enjoy watching butterflies! They look so free among the tall grass and flowers. Created with: Acrylic paint Cotton mini canvas

item.title: My Mother
item.description: When my Mom lived in the Dominican She would carry her water in a bucket. Created with: Casein paint Colored pencils Moab entrada paper

item.title: Playa Rincón
item.description: A hidden beach A wooden boat sits on a peaceful beach in the Dominican Republic. Created with: Acrylic paint Colored pencils Mixed media paper

item.title: Self Portrait
item.description: Why did I paint myself? On a sunny day, my friend took a photo of me in a prayer chapel with stained glass windows. I decided to use that photo as a reference for this painting due to the unique lighting. Created with: Photoshop (digitally hand-painted) My friend’s reference photo :)

item.title: Pink Rose
item.description: Roses Who could resist painting a rose? If you paint a rose, you get to keep it with you. Created with: Gouache paint Pantone postcard

item.title: Butterfly Flower
item.description: Monarch butterfly with a flower Butterflies remind me of a new life (in Christ). Created with: Gouache paint Pantone postcard

item.title: Koala
item.description: One of my favorite animals Koala’s look so cute and cuddly to me! :) Created with: Gouache paint Colored pencils Mixed media paper

item.title: Starting Soon Gif
item.description: A stop motion animation Made for my husband when he would stream games for fun. Created with: Photoshop - digitally painted and animated Determination - to learn how to digitally paint and animate from scratch

item.title: The Sea, Cabo Rojo
item.description: Seaside Salty air, bright colors, and the waves brushing against the coral rocks. Created with: Gouache paint Toned mixed media paper

item.title: Studio Ghibli Study
item.description: Studying Japanese animation This scene is from The Wind Rises (2013) Created with: Gouache paint Acrylic paint Colored pencils Pantone postcard

item.title: Sea Turtle
item.description: Under the sea A sea turtle swims happily! :) Created with: Acrylic paint Pantone postcard
